nodes.name: coding-style.md
nodes.summary: F# coding style guide covering naming conventions, discriminated unions, record types, immutability, function composition, async/Result error handling, and formatting rules for ECC harness F# projects.

nodes.name: hooks.md
nodes.summary: Concise ECC hook configuration guide for F# projects, specifying PostToolUse and Stop hook behaviors such as running tests after file edits and verifying compilation on session end.

nodes.name: patterns.md
nodes.summary: F# design pattern reference covering Result and Option types for error handling, discriminated unions for domain modeling, computation expressions, module organization, and dependency injection patterns.

nodes.name: security.md
nodes.summary: F# security guidelines covering secret management via environment variables, parameterized SQL queries for injection prevention, input validation with Result types, and ASP.NET Core authentication/authorization patterns.

nodes.name: testing.md
nodes.summary: F# testing guide specifying Expecto as the primary test framework, module-based test organization, property-based testing with FsCheck, ASP.NET Core integration testing patterns, and coverage requirements.
